name: Week A
subtitle: Starting week · big stock-up cook
prepDay: Starting week — assume the freezer's empty. This is your biggest cook, and it stocks the freezer for the weeks ahead.
Big batch of vegan chilli: eat one portion, freeze the rest for the coming weeks.
Double batch of mushroom sauce + pasta; freeze a portion.
Fill 2–3 overnight-oats jars (make more fresh midweek); bake a batch of banana & oat muffins for the freezer.

duringWeek.t: Fresh tortillas: brown the chicken, make the yoghurt sauce, chop the veg → assemble fresh. Covers 2 days (≈20 min).
Roll chicken + noodles, chop the veg; roll fresh. One batch covers a full day (lunch + dinner) and the next day (≈15 min).

name: Week B
subtitle: Comfort · lean on the freezer
prepDay: Two quick fresh cooks this week. Make a double batch of turkey bolognese — eat one portion, freeze one for Week D.
Chilli comes from Week A's freezer batch (re-batch only if it's running low).
Fill 2–3 overnight-oats jars (make more fresh midweek); bake banana & oat muffins (≈20 min) for grab-and-go.

duringWeek.t: Bake the chicken tortillas (beans, chickpeas, cheese, salsa): covers 2 days, freeze a spare (≈25 min).
Cook the bro meal: covers 2 days (≈20 min).

name: Week C
subtitle: Wok week · gnocchi gratin
prepDay: Make the gnocchi cream gratin: eat a portion, freeze any spare.
Two quick wok cooks during the week; pull chilli from the freezer.
Fill 2–3 overnight-oats jars (make more fresh midweek); grab baked-pancake squares from the freezer on the other mornings. Re-batch chilli only if low.

duringWeek.t: Fried rice (use cold, day-old rice): covers 2 days (≈20 min).

name: Week D
subtitle: Bake + freezer variety
prepDay: Bake week: oven on. Make the cannelloni — marinara, ricotta-spinach filling, stuff, bake. Eat a portion, freeze the spare.
Baked oven pancake (≈25 min); cut into portions and freeze. Fill 2–3 overnight-oats jars.
The rest is freezer variety — pull gnocchi gratin (from Week C), bolognese (from Week A) and chilli. Re-batch chilli only if low.

duringWeek.t: Chicken in mushroom sauce (cooking cream + mozzarella + parmesan): covers 2 days (≈25 min).
